description: The Act shall be called the Civil Drone (Promotion and Regulation) Bill, 2025 and will come into force on dates notified by the Central Government.
The Act applies to citizens, foreign persons, and entities involved in manufacturing, operating, importing, exporting, or maintaining drones in India.
applies_to: Drone owners, operators, manufacturers, exporters and importers

description: No unmanned aircraft system may be owned or operated unless registered and issued a Unique Identification Number.
No drone may be manufactured, sold or transferred without a valid type certificate issued by DGCA unless exempted.
Drone operation requires valid third‑party insurance coverage meeting government requirements.
